# Gated D Latch - fixed with correct ram addresses
# switch_0 (5) = D
# switch_1 (6) = Enable
# Q = ram[0] (address 16)

# 1. NAND(D, Enable) -> temp ram[32]
0000000000000001
0000000000100000  # out 32
0000000000000101  # D
0000000000000110  # Enable

# 2. NAND(temp, old_Q) -> temp ram[33]
0000000000000001
0000000000100001  # out 33
0000000000100000  # temp
0000000000010000  # old Q (16)

# 3. NAND(temp, temp33) -> temp ram[34]
0000000000000001
0000000000100010  # out 34
0000000000100000  # temp
0000000000100001  # temp33

# 4. new_Q = NAND(temp33, temp34) -> ram[0]
0000000000000001
0000000000010000  # out 16 (ram[0])
0000000000100001  # temp33
0000000000100010  # temp34

# 5. Tape show Q
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000010000  # ram[0]
0000000000000011
